title: aicfg Unified Configuration
description: Single configuration file for the ai-config transpiler: platform output paths and canonical tool name mappings.

src_dir.description: Source directory containing agent/command/rule/skill files. Relative to repo root or absolute.

platforms.description: Platform output configuration keyed by platform name. Only the 'claude' platform supports the 'hooks' field.

tool_map.description: Maps canonical tool names to platform-specific equivalents. Omit a tool to drop it for that platform.

target.description: Output root directory for this platform. Absolute or relative to repo root.

drop_fields.description: Frontmatter fields to omit when transpiling for this platform.

ClaudePlatformConfig.description: Platform config exclusive to Claude Code. Supports all base platform fields plus 'hooks' (PreToolUse only).

hooks.description: Hooks deployment configuration. Fires on the PreToolUse event in Claude Code only.

src_hooks_file.description: Source hooks file to read, relative to repo root. Defaults to 'hooks.yaml' when omitted.

src_context_dir.description: Source directory for context files, relative to repo root. Defaults to 'context' when omitted.

hooks_file.description: Output path for the transformed hooks.yaml (Claude PreToolUse format), relative to target root.

context_dir.description: Output directory for context files referenced by hook actions, relative to target root.

path.description: Output directory path relative to the platform target root.

suffix.description: File suffix appended to output files (e.g. .md, .agent.md, .prompt.md).

extra_fields.description: Additional frontmatter fields injected verbatim for this type.

PlatformToolMap.description: Canonical tool name → platform-specific tool name. Omit a key to drop that tool for this platform.
